ground_truth.title: Live Cams in California - SkylineWebcams
ground_truth.main_content: Live webcam directory featuring webcams across California. Featured locations include: Laguna Beach - View of the Californian coast from The Cliff Restaurant; Santa Barbara - View of Santa Barbara's Stearns Wharf, beach and harbor entrance from Dive Santa Barbara; Encinitas - Panoramic view of the Encinitas' beach, California; Venice Beach - View of the famous Venice Beach in Los Angeles; San Francisco - View over the Golden Bridge in San Francisco; San Francisco Bay - View from San Francisco Bay in California; San Francisco - Bay Bridge - View over the Bay Bridge in San Francisco; San Francisco Skyline - View of the San Francisco skyline and the Golden Bridge; Hermosa Beach - View of the Hermosa Beach boardwalk in California; Orange - View from Orange in California; San Francisco - Treasure Island - View from Treasure Island in San Francisco; Pacifica Pier - View over the Pacifica Pier and beach in California; Santa Rosa - Courthouse Square - View of Courthouse Square in Santa Rosa, California; Manhattan Beach - View from Manhattan Beach in California; Pacifica Pier - View of Pacifica Pier in California; Hummingbird Nest - View of the California hummingbird nest; San Fernando Valley - Panoramic view over the San Fernando Valley, California; San Diego - Rail Cam - View of the railroad area of San Diego, California; Fresno - View from Fresno in California; Palm Springs Air Museum - View of the Air Museum in Palm Springs, California; Mammoth Mountain Ski Area - View over the Mammoth Mountain Ski Area in California; Hummingbird Feeder - View of the hummingbird feeder in Studio City, California; South Lake Tahoe - Airport - View over the South Lake Tahoe Airport in California; Redding Eagles - View of the Eagles Nest in Redding, California; Mammoth Mountain - McCoy Station - View of McCoy Station at Mammoth Mountain; Pine Cove-Idyllwild - View from Pine Cove-Idyllwild in California; San Diego - Ocean Beach - View from Ocean Beach in San Diego; Tehachapi Railroad - View of Tehachapi Railroad in California; San Diego - Cabrillo National Monument - View of Cabrillo National Monument and San Diego Bay; Lee Vining - Panoramic view from Lee Vining, California; San Juan Capistrano - View of the train station in San Juan Capistrano, California; San Diego - Harbor Island - View over San Diego from Harbor Island; San Luis Obispo Train Station - View from the San Luis Obispo's train station in California; Trinitad - Panoramic view over Trinitad Bay, California; San Diego - Lake Otay - View over the Lake Otay in San Diego, California; Mendota - View from the train's depot in Mendota, Illinois.
with: Live Cams in California - SkylineWebcams features an extensive directory of live webcam streams across the state.
The first webcam shows Laguna Beach with a view of the Californian coast from The Cliff Restaurant.
Santa Barbara webcam displays views of Stearns Wharf, beach and harbor entrance from Dive Santa Barbara.
San Francisco webcams offer multiple perspectives including views over the Golden Gate Bridge and Bay Bridge.
The directory includes webcams from diverse locations including beaches, mountains, wildlife areas, and urban centers throughout California.
